comment: Consumer decision-group extensions (G27). The six built-in groups (rls-policy, guc-identity, token-verification, vector-index, llm-sampling, tuning-constants) cover THIS stack's security/LLM surface; add YOUR project's research/domain decision classes here so their constants carry a citation duty too. Each group: {"key": "lowercase-kebab", "description": "...", "patterns": ["regex-source", ...]}. A group you add MUST also gain a corpus entry tagged with its key (the provenance gate's coverage lockstep enforces this). Write-guard-protected: extending the taxonomy is a reviewed act. Example (commented out): a RAG chunk-size decision — {"key": "chunk-size", "description": "retrieval chunk sizing", "patterns": ["chunkSize", "CHUNK_TOKENS"]}.
